director.tagline_zh: 遊戲廣告 × 商業影像導演，紮根台灣
director.tagline_en: Game Ad & Commercial Film Director — Based in Taiwan
director.bio_zh: 鄭又勛（York）是台灣的遊戲廣告與商業影像導演，同時是曜境影像製作工作室創辦人。9 年來執導超過 88 個案子、產出逾 1000 支影音交付物，客戶橫跨 Schick舒適牌、王品集團、GODIVA、Google Play、茶裏王等消費品牌，以及斗羅大陸、天龍八部2、新仙俠：起源、失落的方舟等國際知名遊戲 IP。作品類型橫跨真人實拍、CG特效到AI生成影像等多元技術路線，從創意腳本、拍攝執行到後期製作皆一手包辦。
director.bio_en: York Cheng is a Taiwan-based director specializing in game advertising and commercial film, and the founder of Yao Jing Image Production Studio (registered in Taiwan). Over 9 years, he has directed 88+ projects and delivered 1,000+ final video assets for clients spanning consumer brands — Schick, Wang Steak Group, GODIVA, Google Play, and Tea's Tea — alongside internationally recognized game IPs including Soul Land, Tian Long Ba Bu 2, Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, and Lost Ark. His work spans live-action production, CG effects, and AI-generated imagery, with hands-on involvement from creative scripting and production through post.

works.title_zh: 舒適牌 Schick HydroPRO 磁浮刮鬍刀 OTV
works.desc_zh: 為國際刮鬍刀品牌 Schick 執導的電視廣告，完整走過腳本、PPM、定裝到拍攝的商業製作流程。
works.desc_en: A commercial TVC for international razor brand Schick, taken through the full production pipeline from script and PPM to costume fitting and shoot.
works.concept_zh: 這支是「產品即主角」的科技形象廣告——黑色極簡舞台上讓刀身如懸浮般升起，把「磁浮」科技具象化成環狀藍色光波與微距水流波紋，中段更切進一段藍色六角網格的3D穿梭鏡頭，把看不見的「防護層」變成觀眾能一路穿越的隧道。真人只出現一顆特寫鏡頭：男模側光下的滿意半笑，帶出「前所未有的乾淨舒適感」，其餘全靠產品自身的懸浮、旋轉、zoom-in動態說故事。
works.concept_en: A tech-forward product film where the razor itself is the star — rising as if levitating on a black minimalist stage, its "magnetic" technology rendered as blue light rings and macro ripples of water. Midway, a 3D tunnel-dive through a glowing hexagonal grid turns the invisible "protective layer" into something the viewer travels through. The only human beat is one extreme close-up — a model's satisfied half-smile under side light — everything else is carried by the product's own float, spin, and zoom choreography.

works.desc_zh: 為知名飲料品牌茶裏王執導《客棧圍攻篇》，官方頻道累積近 200 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed "Inn Siege," a spot for popular tea brand Tea's Tea that has drawn nearly 2 million views on its official channel.
works.concept_zh: 這是一支借用武俠片「圍攻」懸念做誤導的古裝喜劇：木造茶客棧場景、持械江湖人物將白衣主角團團圍住，鏡頭調度營造出真正的打鬥危機感，最後用一句「夠嗎」翻轉成「這麼多人喝茶夠不夠」的日常提問，答案是「有大瓶的當然夠」——用類型片的緊張感包裝「大瓶裝夠大家分」的產品賣點，收尾停在兩款1250ml瓶身與「歡聚一起乾 大瓶超回甘」的字卡。
works.concept_en: A period-costume comedy that borrows the tension-staging of a wuxia ambush — a wooden tavern, armed strangers closing in on a white-robed protagonist — to build real "surrounded" suspense, then flips it: the standoff was never about swords, it's whether there's enough tea to go around, answered by an oversized bottle. Genre tension becomes the setup for a simple pack-size punchline, closing on the two bottle SKUs and the line "gather and drink up — the big bottle keeps its aftertaste."

works.title_zh: Google Play 台灣廣告《就差一點》
works.desc_zh: 為 Google Play 台灣執導的品牌廣告《就差一點》，官方頻道累積超過 42 萬觀看。
works.desc_en: Directed the Google Play Taiwan brand campaign "So Close," which has drawn over 420K views on the official YouTube channel.
works.concept_zh: 全片玩的是片名本身的「差一點」焦慮——手遊抽卡/強化最讓人牽腸掛肚的臨門一腳。幾乎整支都用第一人稱手持鏡頭，讓觀眾的視角直接變成滑手機的那雙手：遊戲畫面、Play Points頁面被懟到鏡頭最前面，再切到素人喜感演員誇張的驚喜表情特寫，用「精煉成功」的爆閃金色特效把懸念一次釋放，最後收在電競直播感的霓虹場景，喊出「懂玩就跟上」。
works.concept_en: The film leans directly into the anxiety its title names — that "just one more try" feeling of gacha and gear-enhancement RNG. Shot almost entirely in first-person handheld POV, it puts the viewer's own hands on the phone, cutting straight from gameplay to the Play Points screen before landing on a comedic everyman's over-the-top reaction shot, releasing the tension with a gold-fireworks "success" screen, and closing on a neon esports-stream sign-off.

works.views_note: 官方頻道與導演個人頻道皆查無 2025 新案公開版本，available on request
works.views_note_en: No public 2025 version found on either the official channel or the director's personal channel — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為國際巧克力品牌 GODIVA 執導的品牌影片。
works.desc_en: A brand film directed for international chocolate label GODIVA.
works.concept_zh: 這支GODIVA聖誕廣告把「禮物從天而降」具象化成一件城市尺度的裝置——開場是雪夜街景與一座高聳地標塔樓，一道金色流光劃過天際，隨即揭曉光跡的源頭：一整串疊起的GODIVA巧克力（白巧克力捲、夾心黑巧克力、杏仁焦糖粒），中段插著一根香草莢作裝飾，底端墜著印有GODIVA馬車標誌的深藍玻璃聖誕球，整組吊飾懸在塔樓正上方的雪夜天空，把「精品巧克力」直接放大成一件城市級的聖誕裝置。中段轉場成純品牌畫面：金色低多邊形馴鹿騰躍而過，背景是比利時式金色線稿老城天際線剪影，呼應「GODIVA Belgium 1926」的品牌起源；收尾回到寫實產品攝影——聖誕樹形與熊形巧克力鐵盒、長方形禮盒逐一在深藍底、灑著雪花與緞帶的背景上展開，英文字卡「THE MOST CHOCOLATEY TIME OF THE YEAR」與中文「聖誕限定系列 暖心獻禮」先後收尾。手法上先用「天降巨禮」的奇觀開場抓眼球，再用品牌血統（馴鹿+比利時老城）鋪陳身世，最後才落回可購買的實際商品，把地標奇觀、品牌傳承與商品攝影三層敘事濃縮進15秒。
works.concept_en: This GODIVA Christmas spot renders "a gift descending from the sky" as a city-scaled installation — opening on a snowy night skyline dominated by a tall landmark tower, a streak of gold light tracing across the sky before revealing its source: a stack of GODIVA chocolates (a white-chocolate swirl, dark ganache, almond praline) threaded on a vanilla-bean skewer, hanging from a ribbon bow above a navy glass ornament stamped with the brand's horse-and-carriage crest — the whole assembly suspended over the tower like a city-scaled Christmas decoration. It cuts to pure brand imagery next: low-poly gold reindeer leaping across a gilded silhouette of old European rowhouses, a nod to "Godiva, Belgium 1926." The spot closes on straight product photography — tree- and bear-shaped chocolate tins and the rectangular gift box laid out against a snow-dusted navy backdrop, under the lines "THE MOST CHOCOLATEY TIME OF THE YEAR" and its Chinese counterpart, "聖誕限定系列 暖心獻禮." The approach front-loads spectacle (a landmark-scale falling gift) to earn attention, threads in brand heritage (reindeer, Belgian townhouses) for pedigree, then lands on sellable product shots — compressing landmark spectacle, brand lineage, and commerce into fifteen seconds.

works.views_note: 頻道 Shorts 三部曲(壹/貳/參之型),此為壹之型
works.views_note_en: Part 1 of a three-part Shorts series on the director's channel
works.desc_zh: 為王品集團新餐飲品牌「肉次方」執導的品牌廣告。
works.desc_en: A brand commercial directed for Wang Steak Group's new dining concept, Rou Ci Fang.
works.concept_zh: 這支「肉次方」廣告全片由AI生成影像打造，把燒肉吃到飽包裝成一齣武俠功夫喜劇——揭幕是一整塊油花均勻的原塊牛肉被供於紅光壟罩、格柵木窗的武館長廊中央，黃衣角色恭敬伺立一旁，金色直式字卡打出「原塊牛肉」「肉道黑帶」；隨後切入真正的功夫對打：紮著繡有「肉」字紅頭巾的光頭門徒與身著虎頭刺繡道服的師傅過招，雷電特效纏繞全身，配上「口感的奧義・肉綻」等武俠風字卡，把「肉質軟嫩」講成一種需要修煉的武功心法。全片以「型」為段落單位（壹之型、貳之型、參之型……），每段開場都是紅霧字卡報幕，如「貳之型・手起刀落・黃金分割」，呼應武俠片的招式命名慣例；動作場面之間穿插高度寫實的超微距開肉鏡頭——刀刃劃過油花均勻的生肉，是全片唯一「真實」質感的畫面，與CG武打形成強烈對比。手法上用武俠敘事包裝吃到飽燒肉品牌的賣點，讓「吃肉」變成人人可修行的江湖，最終收在「切肉之道」「肉道黑帶 x 最知道」與「燒肉肉次方 POWER of MEAT 放題」的品牌字卡，詼諧誇張中帶著自嘲式的中二感。
works.concept_en: Built entirely from AI-generated CG, this "Rou Ci Fang" spot turns an all-you-can-eat yakiniku brand into a wuxia kung-fu comedy. It opens on a whole marbled cut of beef enshrined in a red-lit, lattice-windowed dojo corridor, a robed figure standing reverently beside it as gold vertical title cards declare "原塊牛肉" (whole-cut beef) and "肉道黑帶" (Black Belt of the Meat Way). The film then cuts to genuine martial-arts choreography — a bald disciple in a headband embroidered with the character for "meat" squares off against a tiger-emblazoned master, lightning crackling across their bodies, captioned with wuxia-style lines like "the profound meaning of texture" — treating tenderness itself as a martial art to be mastered. The whole piece is segmented like kung-fu "forms" (Type One, Type Two, Type Three...), each opening on a red-mist title card ("Type Two: the blade falls, the golden ratio"), echoing how wuxia films name their moves; between the action beats sit hyper-real macro shots of a blade slicing through evenly marbled raw beef — the film's only "real" texture, deliberately jarring against the CG fight scenes. The wuxia framing turns a buffet restaurant's pitch into a martial path anyone can join, closing on "The Way of Cutting Meat," the "肉道黑帶 x 最知道" collab credit, and the "Power of Meat" all-you-can-eat branding — broad, self-aware, and gleefully over-the-top.

works.views_note: 原配對誤植為競品版本（林志穎、坤達、鳳小岳三人合演的官方TVC，108萬觀看，非本案）。已依鄭又勛導演作品頻道 cX7d8eiJfz8 說明欄核實：導演鄭又勛／代言人林志穎（僅一人）；查無對應的官方高觀看版本，故觀看數不顯示，available on request
works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled a competing version (an official TVC co-starring Jimmy Lin, Kunda, and Rhydian Vaughan, 1.08M views — not this case). Verified via York Cheng's director channel description for cX7d8eiJfz8: director York Cheng, single endorser Jimmy Lin only; no matching high-view official version was found, so the view count is not shown — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為經典武俠 IP《天龍八部2》執導廣告，由林志穎代言（依導演頻道說明欄核實，非坊間流傳的三人版）。
works.desc_en: Directed the commercial for classic wuxia IP Tian Long Ba Bu 2, featuring endorser Jimmy Lin (verified via the director's own channel description; not the widely-circulated three-endorser cut).
works.concept_zh: 《天龍八部2》手遊廣告以段譽的獨行開場——雪地裡，林志穎飾演鬢髮已白的段譽，獨自走過雁門關外的漫天飛雪，六脈神劍拂雪而起，帶出與喬峰、虛竹結義、失去語嫣的往事閃回；三杯血酒祭奠亡兄後，木婉清牽白馬歸來，「也永遠兄弟齊心」定格為全片情感核心。手法上以大量CG雪原環境包覆林志穎的實拍表演，用寫實特寫捕捉他眼角的風霜與情緒轉折，讓「金庸正版授權」的江湖情懷透過演員的臉直接落地，而非只靠特效說故事。
works.concept_en: The Tianlong Babu 2 trailer opens on solitude — Lin Zhiying, as a grey-haired Duan Yu, walks alone through a blizzard outside Yanmen Pass, his Six Meridian Divine Sword parting the snow to trigger flashbacks of brotherhood with Qiao Feng and Xuzhu, and the lost love of Wang Yuyan. Three cups of blood wine are poured for fallen brothers before Mu Wanqing returns leading a white horse, landing on the film's emotional core: "bound as brothers, forever as one." The approach layers live-action performance into a fully CG snowscape, holding tight on Lin's face to carry the wuxia melancholy through real expression rather than spectacle alone — grounding the game's "officially licensed Jin Yong" pedigree in a human face.

works.title_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.client_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
works.views_note: 原配對為官方頻道無代言人的通用 PV（l6HfuzRfLO0，36.6萬觀看），與導演頻道實際案件（高燃集結篇/斗羅時空篇，代言人：汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明）不符。已改用官方頻道同代言人陣容版本（終極一班跨時空集結篇，20.8萬觀看），與導演頻道說明欄代言人確認一致
works.views_note_en: The original match was a generic official-channel PV with no endorsers (l6HfuzRfLO0, 366K views), which didn't match the director channel's actual case (endorsers Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming). Replaced with the official-channel version featuring the same endorser lineup (208K views), consistent with the endorsers confirmed in the director channel's description
works.desc_zh: 為知名 IP《斗羅大陸：獵魂世界》執導代言廣告，找回終極一班班底汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明重返校園場景，以「宗門集結」的召喚敘事貫穿全片。
works.desc_en: Directed the endorsement campaign for the major game IP Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters, reuniting KO ONE cast members Jiro Wang, Calvin Chen, Pets Tseng, and Chang Hao-Ming in their old school setting, built around a "Sect Assembly" call-to-arms.
works.concept_zh: 《斗羅大陸：獵魂世界》高燃集結篇把終極一班原班人馬——汪東城、辰亦儒、曾沛慈、張皓明——請回當年的校園場景，讓他們穿著劇中招牌黑色制服在熟悉的走廊裡重逢，此時「魂獸」破牆來襲，四人隨即以CG特效召喚出遊戲裡的武魂（雷錘、光劍、羽翼），把「終極一班」的兄弟情直接轉譯成遊戲的「宗門集結」；手法是實拍校園場景疊加高飽和度CG武器特效，讓觀眾對這群人多年累積的情感投射，變成對遊戲武魂養成系統的期待。
works.concept_en: The "Soul Land: New World" spot brings the original KO One cast — Wang Dong-cheng, Chen Yi-han, Amber Kuo, and Zhang Hao-ming — back to their old school corridor, reuniting in the drama's signature black uniforms just as a "soul beast" bursts through the wall. The four summon their in-game Martial Souls — a thunder hammer, a glowing blade, spectral wings — as CG effects erupting from live-action bodies, turning KO One's decades-old on-screen brotherhood straight into the game's "Sect Assembly" pitch: real nostalgia for a fictional reunion, sold as an in-game bond.

works.views_note: 越南代理商官方頻道查無公開版本，僅導演個人頻道存檔（個位數觀看），available on request
works.views_note_en: No public version found on the Vietnamese publisher's official channel; only archived on the director's personal channel (single-digit views) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《開天》執導廣告，由林志穎代言，以雲海仙山的意象扣回「開天」的世界觀命題。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Kaitian (Heaven's Gate), featuring endorser Jimmy Lin, framed around a sea-of-clouds mountaintop vision that echoes the game's own origin-myth premise.
works.concept_zh: 《開天》手遊廣告讓林志穎立於雲海之上，一身青白仙袍背對鏡頭遠眺浮空山巒，獨白「心中的光是什麼」把遊戲名「開天」直接扣回「開創天地」的哲學提問；中段穿插竹林裡「萌生情愫的瞬間」的兒女私情畫面，與冰系光劍對決烈焰惡靈「逆天終成灰燼」的CG大戰場面交錯剪接，最終回到林志穎獨自站上仙山之巔、俯瞰祥雲異獸的畫面收尾。手法上，林志穎不扮演對話中的具體角色，而是以近乎「敘事者／開天者」的姿態貫穿全片，用他本人沉靜的氣質為這款仙俠手遊立下「天地由我開」的世界觀基調。
works.concept_en: The Khai Thien trailer places Lin Zhiying above a sea of clouds, back to camera in pale cultivator robes, gazing at floating peaks as his voiceover asks "what is the light within" — collapsing the game's title, "Opening Heaven," into an origin-myth question. A brief romantic aside, "the moment feelings blossom," plays out in a bamboo grove, cut against a full CG clash of ice magic versus a fire demon, "defiance ends in ash." It closes on Lin alone atop a mountain of immortals, watching a mythic beast glide through the clouds. Rather than voicing a character in dialogue, Lin functions almost as narrator and world-maker — lending his composed screen presence to anchor the xianxia fantasy's "the world begins with me" framing.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：徐若瑄），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Vivian Hsu) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《神魔傳說》執導廣告，由徐若瑄代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Shen Mo Chuan Shuo, featuring endorser Vivian Hsu.
works.concept_zh: 這支廣告全片以電影特效等級的CG動畫打造，岩漿裂谷、燃燒祭壇、翻湧的青綠色靈氣接連湧現，搭配歌詞跑字如史詩神曲MV；唯一寫實的落款，是片尾徐若瑄以插畫肖像端坐白骨王座、掛名代言人現身，「白骨之下 皆為螻蟻」一句道盡遊戲的神魔對決世界觀。手法上刻意捨棄真人代言人出鏡，改用她的名字與畫像去背書一整支CG史詩，讓廣告本身就是遊戲世界的預告片，而非明星帶貨短片。
works.concept_en: The entire spot is built from cinematic-grade CG — lava rifts, a burning altar, and swirling jade-green spectral energy roll past under scrolling lyric captions like an epic theme-song music video. The one moment of "reality" is Vivian Hsu's illustrated portrait enthroned on a pile of bones at the very end, credited by name, with the line "beneath the white bones, all are mere ants" summing up the game's gods-and-demons stakes. Skipping a live-action appearance in favor of lending her name and likeness to a fully CG epic turns the ad itself into a trailer for the game's world, not a celebrity endorsement clip.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：林心如），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Ruby Lin) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《超爆三國志》執導廣告，由林心如代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Chao Bao San Guo Zhi, featuring endorser Ruby Lin.
works.concept_zh: 廣告把林心如打造成穿著黑色亮片晚禮服、氣場全開的都會女神，長髮迎風飄揚的時尚特寫直接切入建安十二年赤壁的熊熊戰火場景，她赤足踩過餘燼、雙手催動藍色雷電能量，把「終結亂世 靠我們了」的台詞化為視覺奇觀。手法是典型的真人實拍加特效合成：林心如以自己的明星形象「降臨」古戰場，不是扮演劇中人物，而是以代言人親自出手改寫三國的姿態，代替玩家喊出遊戲的爽感賣點。
works.concept_en: The ad casts Ruby Lin as a full-glam urban goddess in a black sequined gown, hair whipping in the wind — a fashion-shoot close-up that cuts straight into the raging fires of the Battle of Red Cliffs. She walks barefoot through the embers, conjuring blue lightning from her bare hands as the line "ending this chaos is up to us" becomes visual spectacle. This is straight live-action-plus-VFX: Ruby Lin "descends" onto the ancient battlefield as herself, not as a costumed character, standing in for the player to physically deliver the game's power fantasy.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：吳宗憲），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Jacky Wu) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為策略手遊《文明與征服》（官方英文名 Era of Conquest）執導廣告，由吳宗憲代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the strategy mobile game Era of Conquest (文明與征服), featuring endorser Jacky Wu.
works.concept_zh: 廣告靠一場「東西方帝王互嗆」的短劇撐起笑點：吳宗憲一身冕旒龍袍端坐龍椅，對面是月桂冠、紅披風的羅馬皇帝角色反覆嗆聲「我不服」，吳宗憲乾脆拔劍回嗆「不服 就打到你服」，下一秒直接切進遊戲對戰地圖畫面，片尾他手持手機、站上「ERA OF CONQUEST」片頭字卡前對鏡頭喊話。這支完全是本人喜劇魂上身：不靠代言人光環，而是直接把吳宗憲主持人的插科打諢功力搬進短劇，讓「文明衝突」的遊戲賣點變成一場真人尬戲。
works.concept_en: The spot is carried by a short comedic skit of East-meets-West emperors trading insults — Wu Tsung-hsien sits enthroned in a full imperial robe and beaded crown, while a laurel-wreathed "Roman emperor" across from him repeats "I don't submit." Wu draws a sword and fires back, "Don't submit? We'll fight until you do," before the scene cuts straight into an in-game battle map, and closes with Wu holding his phone in front of the "ERA OF CONQUEST" title card, talking directly to camera. This leans entirely on Wu's own comic timing rather than star wattage, turning the game's "clash of civilizations" hook into a genuine live-action sketch.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（金庸正版授權手遊，說明欄核實代言人：徐錦江），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (an officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game; endorser confirmed via video description: Elvis Tsui) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為金庸正版授權手遊《新鹿鼎記》執導電視廣告，由徐錦江代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a TVC for the officially Louis Cha-licensed mobile game Xin Lu Ding Ji, featuring endorser Elvis Tsui.
works.concept_zh: 廣告用一連串「公子與眾佳麗」的古裝喜劇橋段鋪陳遊戲的收集樂趣：雙胞胎姊妹「大雙兒／小雙兒」齊聲宣告「我們已經是公子的人了」，三名女子環繞彈唱、赤足搭在錦榻上，最後徐錦江以白鬚紅笠的年長角色現身，被群芳圍繞時脫口喊出「我全都要」。手法上刻意不走武打對決戲路，而是把徐錦江過去給人的狠角色形象倒過來用——讓他演一個貪心討喜的收藏家，用一句「我全都要」的喜感雙關，直接對應手遊集卡抽角色的核心玩法。
works.concept_en: The ad builds its "the young master and his beauties" costume-comedy bits to sell the game's collection hook — twin sisters "Big Shuang'er / Little Shuang'er" declare in unison "we already belong to the young master," three women lounge and play music around him on a silk daybed, and finally Norman Chu appears as a white-bearded elder character surrounded by admirers, blurting "I want them all." Rather than lean on the tough-guy image he's known for, the spot flips it, casting him as a greedy, lovable collector whose punchline doubles as a wink at the game's core gacha-collecting mechanic.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版_完整版（說明欄核實代言人：Selina任家萱、任容萱姊妹），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel, full cut (endorsers confirmed via video description: sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《新仙俠：起源》執導廣告，由 Selina 任家萱與任容萱姊妹代言。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Xin Xianxia: Qiyuan, featuring sisters Selina Jen and Lorene Jen.
works.concept_zh: 從一面古鏡照見另一個自己出發，把任家萱／任容萱這對雙生姊妹的緣分具象化成一場鏡中相認的戲——霧氣氤氳的閨房、林間並肩奔逃的驚魂夜、鏡前四目相對的重逢，層層堆疊出宿命糾纏的氛圍；結尾轉入巨獸破海與星海祕境的特效奇觀，收束在「守護世界」的仙俠命題上。二人由真人詮釋姊妹情深、亦正亦幻的雙重身分，情感戲與CG奇觀交織，呈現起源篇該有的史詩開場感。
works.concept_en: Framed around a mirror that reflects one twin back as the other, this origin story turns Selina and Rene Ren's real-life sibling bond into an on-screen tale of fated recognition — a mist-veiled boudoir, a night flight through the forest, a face-to-face reunion before an antique mirror — before erupting into sea-monster CG spectacle and a cosmic finale landing on the wuxia theme of "guarding the world." Real sisters play mirrored, dual-natured roles, threading intimate drama through fantasy-scale effects for an origin chapter that earns its epic opening.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：陳漢典），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Hank Chen) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《斬妖》執導事前預約廣告，由陳漢典代言。
works.desc_en: Directed a pre-registration campaign ad for the mobile game Zhan Yao, featuring endorser Hank Chen.
works.concept_zh: 斬妖嘴硬篇拿「空虛」這個詞玩雙關，把陳漢典化身的新角色「空虛公子」寫成一個自嗨耍廢的喜劇人設——手持寫著「空虛」的扇子，在櫻花園裡自封天下第一、自誇風格獨具，身旁婢女配角一臉尷尬吐槽，直到收工喊卡「走啦下班了」打破第四面牆，才切回遊戲CG的角色登場畫面。真人棚拍情境喜劇銜接遊戲角色動態演出，一案還延伸出氣喘篇、帥哥篇與復古黑白MV等多支番外，展現這次合作案的規模與玩心。
works.concept_en: The "Mouth Tough" cut turns a pun on "void/hollow" (空虛) into slapstick comedy: Aaron Chen's new in-game persona, Young Master Void, fans himself with a placard bearing the same word while declaring himself number one under heaven — self-styled and thoroughly self-satisfied — as the maidens beside him roll their eyes, until the crew literally calls it a wrap and breaks the fourth wall, cutting straight into the character's CG game reveal. Live-action sitcom bridges seamlessly into in-game motion capture, and the same case spun off a "breathless" cut, a "handsome" cut, and a retro black-and-white parody MV — a small comedic universe built around one running joke.

works.views_note: 鄭又勛導演作品頻道存檔版（說明欄核實代言人：李多慧；另有張衛健代言版本，非本支），available on request
works.views_note_en: Archived on York Cheng's director channel (endorser confirmed via video description: Lee Da-hye; a separate cut featured Dicky Cheung, not this one) — available on request
works.desc_zh: 為手遊《玩賺大都會》執導廣告，由李多慧代言（另有張衛健代言版本）。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the mobile game Wan Zhuan Da Du Hui, featuring endorser Lee Da-hye (a separate cut featured Dicky Cheung).
works.concept_zh: 玩賺大都會用「換裝快剪」把李多慧一人分飾都市裡的多重身分——沙灘辣妹、啦啦隊隊長、視訊開會的女強人、頂著髮捲窩在沙發上的耍廢女子，像在展示這款都市模擬遊戲裡玩家能任意切換的生活面貌。高潮處把耍廢造型放大成整棟大樓的巨幅看板，樓下群眾竟也人手一顆髮捲跟著搖擺歡呼，把「全城搖擺」的口號變成畫面上真實發生的集體行動，詼諧誇張中帶點都市生活的自嘲感。
works.concept_en: "Metropolis Play" cuts rapidly through Lee Da-hee playing multiple city personas in quick succession — beach babe, cheerleader captain, video-conferencing girlboss, and a curler-headed couch potato — mirroring the game's promise of a metropolis where players can be anyone. The gag peaks when her lazy-day look gets blown up into a building-sized billboard, and the crowd below is caught mid-cheer wearing the exact same hair curlers, turning the tagline "shake the whole city" into a literal, collectively staged punchline — broad, self-aware comedy about modern urban life.

works.views_note: 本篇單支影片 10.2萬觀看；同系列「震撼登場」全 8 支官方影片合計超過 290 萬觀看
works.views_note_en: This single cut has drawn 102K views; the full "Shocking Debut" series of 8 official videos has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views
works.desc_zh: 為國際大作《失落的方舟》（Amazon Games）執導廣告，官方系列影片合計觀看數超過 290 萬。
works.desc_en: Directed advertising for the major title Lost Ark (Amazon Games); the official campaign series has drawn a combined 2.9M+ views.
works.concept_zh: 命運篇捨棄代言人，純粹以電影級CG說一則「墮入黑暗」的寓言——斗篷身影自青灰霧氣中浮現、血紅森林剪影配上「命運背向陽光走進黑暗時」的旁白，鏡頭墜入一圈吞噬靈魂的血色漩渦，力量與詛咒同時甦醒；末段收束在七個職業並列的選角畫面與「選擇你的命運吧」一句，把敘事張力直接轉譯成玩家即將面臨的抉擇，收在焦土荒原與LOST ARK標誌的孤影畫面。
works.concept_en: With no celebrity face to lean on, the Fate cut tells its story purely through cinematic-grade CG — a cloaked figure emerging from gray-teal mist, a blood-red forest silhouette under the line "when destiny turns from the light and walks into darkness," then a plunge into a crimson vortex that swallows souls whole as a forbidden power awakens. It closes by translating that dread directly into gameplay stakes: a seven-class selection screen and the line "choose your fate," ending on a lone armored figure against a scorched wasteland beneath the Lost Ark mark.

_removed_works.title_zh: RO仙境傳說：初心之戰《律師篇》
_removed_works.client: RO 仙境傳說：初心之戰
_removed_works.views_note: 原配對案名誤植為「曙光」，鄭又勛導演作品頻道實際收錄的是《RO仙境傳說：初心之戰》（醫師篇/教授篇/律師篇三支），查無「曙光」。已改為官方頻道（GRAVITY COMMUNICATIONS）同案「律師篇_15秒」版本，與導演頻道律師篇（9uJV8x3Foq4，導演:鄭又勛）標題一致確認
_removed_works.views_note_en: The original pairing mislabeled the case as "Dawn"; the director's own channel actually lists Ragnarok Online: The First Fight ("Doctor"/"Professor"/"Lawyer" cuts) with no "Dawn" entry. Replaced with the official channel's (GRAVITY COMMUNICATIONS) "Lawyer_15s" cut of the same case, confirmed consistent with the "Lawyer" cut on the director's channel (9uJV8x3Foq4, director: York Cheng)
_removed_works.desc_zh: 為經典大型 IP《仙境傳說：初心之戰》執導廣告（律師篇），官方頻道累積超過 28 萬觀看。
_removed_works.desc_en: Directed an ad ("Lawyer" cut) for the classic large-scale IP Ragnarok Online: The First Fight, drawing 280K+ views on its official channel.

brands_en: Soul Land: World of Soul Hunters
